title: Avoid exposing fields with public or internal visibility
messageFormat: Make this field private or protected and expose it through a property if it must be reachable.
summary: A field that is public or internal lets any caller read and overwrite the value with no validation, no change notification, and no way to evolve the implementation later. Properties give the same syntax to callers while keeping the storage encapsulated.
Constants are exempt because their value can never change.
